title.zh: Ente 推出 Ensu：主打隐私的本地 LLM 运行应用
title.en: Ente Launches Ensu for Privacy-Centric Local LLM Execution

summary.zh: Ente 推出了 Ensu，这是一款专为在本地硬件上完全运行大语言模型（LLM）而设计的应用程序。通过优先考虑设备端执行，Ensu 为云端 AI 服务提供了一个隐私优先的替代方案，确保敏感的用户数据永远不会离开机器。这一发布符合更广泛的「本地优先 AI」运动，旨在减少延迟并提高个人 AI 交互的安全性。该应用展示了在消费级硬件上运行复杂模型且不牺牲性能的可行性正日益提高。
summary.en: Ente has launched Ensu, a dedicated application designed to run Large Language Models (LLMs) entirely on local hardware. By prioritizing on-device execution, Ensu offers a privacy-first alternative to cloud-based AI services, ensuring that sensitive user data never leaves the machine. This release aligns with the broader 'Local-first AI' movement, which seeks to reduce latency and improve security for personal AI interactions. The app demonstrates the increasing feasibility of running sophisticated models on consumer-grade hardware without compromising performance.

title.zh: GitHub 更新 Copilot 数据政策以提升透明度
title.en: GitHub Updates Copilot Data Policy to Enhance Transparency

summary.zh: GitHub 宣布对其 Copilot 交互数据使用政策进行重大更新，以明确开发者的提示词（prompts）和建议是如何被处理的。新政策旨在为企业客户提供关于数据保留和底层模型训练的更高透明度。通过完善这些条款，GitHub 正在解决 AI 辅助编程中日益增长的知识产权和数据隐私担忧。随着 AI 工具深度嵌入专业软件开发生命周期，此举对于维持开发者信任至关重要。
summary.en: GitHub has announced significant updates to its Copilot interaction data usage policy to clarify how developer prompts and suggestions are handled. The new policy aims to provide greater transparency for enterprise customers regarding data retention and the training of underlying models. By refining these terms, GitHub is addressing growing concerns over intellectual property and data privacy in AI-assisted coding. This move is critical for maintaining developer trust as AI tools become deeply embedded in the professional software development lifecycle.

title.zh: Claude Code 90% 的输出流向低星 GitHub 仓库
title.en: 90% of Claude Code Output Targets Small GitHub Repositories

summary.zh: Claude Code 的最新使用数据揭示了一个趋势：该工具生成的代码中有 90% 被提交到了星标数（stars）少于 2 个的 GitHub 仓库中。这表明 AI 编程智能体目前正主导着软件开发的「长尾」领域，例如个人脚本、原型开发和分众工具，而非大型开源项目。该指标强调了 AI 正在从简单的辅助工具转变为驱动快速、小规模软件创作的核心动力。这些数据为我们观察开发者如何将智能体工作流整合到日常任务中提供了一个独特的视角。
summary.en: Claude Code's usage data reveals a surprising trend: 90% of the code generated by the tool is being committed to GitHub repositories with fewer than two stars. This indicates that AI coding agents are currently dominating the 'long tail' of software development, such as personal scripts, prototypes, and niche tools, rather than major open-source projects. The metric underscores the shift from AI as a mere assistant to a primary driver for rapid, small-scale software creation. This data provides a unique window into how developers are actually integrating agentic workflows into their daily tasks.

title.zh: 开发者为 Claude Code 提出纯文本认知架构
title.en: Plain-Text Cognitive Architecture Proposed for Claude Code

summary.zh: 一种新的纯文本认知架构被提出，旨在增强 Anthropic 终端编程工具 Claude Code 的推理能力。该架构使用结构化的文本文件来定义 AI 的决策过程，使其「思考」和行动对开发者而言更加透明且可审计。通过摆脱不透明的黑盒提示词，这种方法可以更好地调试和优化复杂的智能体任务。它代表了在软件工程中构建更具预测性和可控性的 AI 智能体迈出的重要一步。
summary.en: A new plain-text cognitive architecture has been proposed to enhance the reasoning capabilities of Claude Code, Anthropic's terminal-based coding tool. This architecture uses structured text files to define the AI's decision-making processes, making its thoughts and actions more transparent and auditable for developers. By moving away from opaque black-box prompting, this approach allows for better debugging and refinement of complex agentic tasks. It represents a significant step toward more predictable and controllable AI agents in software engineering.

title.zh: Optio 实现在 Kubernetes 中编排 AI 编程智能体
title.en: Optio Orchestrates AI Coding Agents Within Kubernetes

summary.zh: Optio 是一个全新的开源框架，旨在 Kubernetes 环境中编排 AI 编程智能体，实现从 Jira 工单到拉取请求（PR）的自动化路径。通过利用 K8s 基础设施，Optio 允许团队扩展智能体工作流，并管理自主编程任务所需的计算资源。该工具解决了新兴 AI 软件工程领域对企业级编排的需求。它凸显了 AI 智能体正从实验性脚本转变为现代 DevOps 技术栈中集成组件的趋势。
summary.en: Optio is a new open-source framework designed to orchestrate AI coding agents within Kubernetes environments, automating the path from a Jira ticket to a Pull Request. By leveraging K8s infrastructure, Optio allows teams to scale agentic workflows and manage the compute resources required for autonomous coding tasks. This tool addresses the need for enterprise-grade orchestration in the burgeoning field of AI software engineering. It highlights the transition of AI agents from experimental scripts to integrated components of the modern DevOps stack.

title.zh: Claude 被发现是 OpenAI 仓库的第三大贡献者
title.en: Claude Identified as Top Contributor in OpenAI Repository

summary.zh: 在 AI 行业一次引人注目的交叉协作中，Anthropic 的 Claude 模型被列为 OpenAI 最近发布的一个代码库的第三大贡献者。这一现象凸显了现代 AI 开发的务实现状：即使是顶尖的实验室也会利用竞争对手的模型来优化其内部工作流和代码生成。该事件引发了关于不同大模型在专业软件工程中的互操作性和实用性的广泛讨论。它象征性地提醒人们，AI 竞赛不仅关乎模型的主导地位，更关乎如何有效整合各种工具。
summary.en: In a notable instance of industry cross-pollination, Anthropic's Claude model was listed as the third-largest contributor to a recently released repository from OpenAI. This occurrence highlights the pragmatic reality of modern AI development, where even leading labs utilize competitor models to optimize their internal workflows and code generation. The event sparked significant discussion regarding the interoperability and utility of different LLMs in professional software engineering. It serves as a symbolic reminder that the AI race is as much about effective tool integration as it is about model supremacy.

title.zh: 维基百科禁止 AI 生成文章以维护内容完整性
title.en: Wikipedia Bans AI-Generated Articles to Protect Content Integrity

summary.zh: 维基百科正式更新准则，禁止编辑使用 AI 撰写或重写文章，该禁令目前适用于英文版。此举源于 AI 生成内容频繁违反关于准确性、可靠性和防止「幻觉」的核心政策。虽然在某些非创作场景下仍允许使用 AI 工具，但该禁令旨在防止低质量自动化条目的扩散。这一决定凸显了开放知识平台与合成数据激增之间日益加剧的矛盾，强调了人类审核在维护信息真实性方面不可替代的作用。
summary.en: Wikipedia has officially updated its guidelines to prohibit editors from using AI to write or rewrite articles, specifically targeting the English version. The decision stems from concerns that AI-generated content frequently violates core policies regarding accuracy, reliability, and the prevention of hallucinations. While certain specific AI tools are still permitted for non-creative tasks, the ban aims to prevent the proliferation of low-quality automated entries. This move highlights the growing tension between open-knowledge platforms and the influx of synthetic data, emphasizing human oversight.

title.zh: 美国参议员推动强制披露数据中心能源消耗
title.en: US Senators Push for Mandatory Data Center Energy Disclosures

summary.zh: 参议员 Elizabeth Warren 和 Josh Hawley 正式要求能源信息署（EIA）实施数据中心年度能耗强制披露制度。这项跨党派行动旨在提高 AI 基础设施巨大电力需求及其对国家电网影响的透明度。通过公开这些数据，立法者希望更深入地了解 AI 热潮的环境足迹并确保电网的长期稳定性。该倡议反映了监管机构对维持大规模计算集群所需的物理资源（如电力和水）日益严格的审查趋势。
summary.en: Senators Elizabeth Warren and Josh Hawley have formally requested the Energy Information Administration (EIA) to implement mandatory annual energy-use disclosures for data centers. This bipartisan effort seeks to increase transparency regarding the massive electricity demands of AI infrastructure and its impact on the national power grid. By making this data public, lawmakers aim to better understand the environmental footprint of the AI boom and ensure long-term grid stability. This initiative reflects increasing regulatory scrutiny over the physical resources required to sustain large-scale computing clusters.

title.zh: Webtoon 为全球创作者推出 AI 本地化工具
title.en: Webtoon Launches AI Localization Tools for Global Creator Growth

summary.zh: Webtoon 宣布对其 Canvas 平台进行重大更新，为用户上传的漫画引入 AI 驱动的本地化和翻译工具。这些功能旨在帮助独立艺术家克服语言障碍，更高效地触达国际受众。除了翻译，更新还包括高级分析功能，帮助创作者了解全球互动模式和变现机会。通过将 AI 集成到创作工作流中，Webtoon 旨在实现全球分发的民主化，并为其多元化的创作者群体增强商业可行性。
summary.en: Webtoon has announced a major update to its Canvas platform, introducing AI-powered localization and translation tools for user-uploaded comics. These features are designed to help independent artists overcome language barriers and reach international audiences more efficiently. Beyond translation, the update includes advanced analytics to help creators understand global engagement patterns and monetization opportunities. By integrating AI into the creative workflow, Webtoon aims to democratize global distribution and enhance the commercial viability of its diverse creator base.

title.zh: 欧盟议会支持禁止「脱衣」应用并推迟 AI 法案合规期限
title.en: EU Parliament Backs Nudify App Ban While Delaying AI Act Deadlines

summary.zh: 欧洲立法者投票决定禁止使用 AI 生成非自愿性图像的「脱衣」应用，以应对紧迫的伦理和安全担忧。与此同时，欧洲议会批准推迟《欧盟 AI 法案》中的关键合规截止日期，特别是针对高风险 AI 系统的开发商。这些影响健康和安全的系统现在将有更多时间来满足该联盟严厉的监管要求。这一双重举措表明了欧盟在致力于立即减少伤害的同时，也承认了实施广泛 AI 治理所面临的技术复杂性。
summary.en: European lawmakers have voted to ban 'nudify' apps that use AI to generate non-consensual sexual imagery, addressing urgent ethical and safety concerns. Simultaneously, the European Parliament approved delays for key compliance deadlines within the EU AI Act, specifically for developers of high-risk AI systems. These systems, which impact health and safety, will now have more time to meet the bloc's stringent regulatory requirements. The dual move shows a commitment to immediate harm reduction while acknowledging the technical complexities of implementing broad AI governance.

title.zh: OpenAI 无限期搁置性化「成人模式」聊天机器人计划
title.en: OpenAI Indefinitely Shelves Plans for Sexualized Adult Mode

summary.zh: 在面临内部员工和投资者的反对后，OpenAI 决定无限期暂停 ChatGPT 「成人模式」的开发。该项目原计划探索性化 AI 交互，但被认为可能对社会有害，且与公司的核心产品定位不符。关于色情 AI 的伦理影响及其对品牌安全冲击的担忧是取消该计划的主要原因。这一转变强化了 OpenAI 目前的战略，即优先考虑企业级可靠性和通用安全性，而非开发小众且高风险的内容类别。
summary.en: OpenAI has decided to indefinitely pause the development of an 'adult mode' for ChatGPT following internal and investor pushback. The project, which aimed to explore sexualized AI interactions, was deemed potentially harmful to society and inconsistent with the company's core product focus. Concerns regarding the ethical implications of erotic AI and its impact on brand safety were primary drivers for the cancellation. This pivot reinforces OpenAI's current strategy of prioritizing enterprise reliability and general-purpose safety over niche, high-risk content categories.

title.zh: Google 发布 Gemini 3.1 Flash Live 提升语音交互自然度
title.en: Google Releases Gemini 3.1 Flash Live for Natural Audio Interactions

summary.zh: Google 正式推出了 Gemini 3.1 Flash Live，这是一个针对低延迟、自然语音通信优化的新模型版本。该模型现已在 Google 产品生态中上线，重点提升了实时语音交互的可靠性和对话流畅度。与之前的版本相比，它具备增强的处理能力，能够更细致地理解语气和语境。此次发布代表了 Google 在多模态 AI 领域持续发力，旨在通过让语音优先界面变得更加无缝和拟人化，来进一步占领日常用户市场。
summary.en: Google has officially launched Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, a new model iteration optimized for low-latency, natural audio communication. Now available across Google's product ecosystem, the model focuses on improving reliability and conversational flow in real-time voice interactions. It features enhanced processing capabilities that allow for more nuanced understanding of tone and context compared to previous versions. This release represents Google's ongoing effort to dominate the multimodal AI space by making voice-first interfaces more seamless and human-like for everyday users.
